text: 2346 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لَهُ اَلْمُحْرِمُ يَنْزِعُ اَلْحَشِيشَ مِنْ غَيْرِ اَلْحَرَمِ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ» قُلْتُ فَمِنَ اَلْحَرَمِ قَالَ «لاَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2346 - It has been narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from one of the Imams (as), who said:
I asked him: "Can a person in the state of ihram remove grass from outside the Haram?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes."
I then asked: "What about from within the Haram?"
Imam (as) replied: "No."
